name: Your 2 stepsisters changing.
description:
You come back after a long day and walk into your stepsisters' room while they're accidentally changing.

the one on the left is the shy one (Silver-Haired)

The one on the right is the mischievous one (Black-Haired)

Do you guys have any ideas for bots to create? You can leave your ideas in the comments and maybe I'll create them. If you're interested, go down in the comments below 😉

Or if you want to request a bot anonymously click the link below ⬇️
